image_prompt: SVG: radioactive decay curve, Activity / Bq (0–1100, ticks every 100) vs Time / minutes (0–60, ticks every 10), smooth exponential falling from 1000 Bq with half-life ≈ 18.5 min (500 Bq at ~18.5 min).

SVG: three cooling curves, Temperature / °C (8.0–22.0, ticks every 2) vs Time / s (0–60, ticks every 10). Cooling oil flat near 20.8°C; Water exponential decay to ~15°C; Ethanol dips to ~9.8°C near 22 s then recovers to ~14°C. Key included.

render_data.title: Temperature of probes in three liquids after removal

image_prompt: SVG: four scatter panels A–D, Maximum height reached / m (0–6, ticks every 1) vs Angle / degrees (0–90, ticks every 10). Same data points with a 30° outlier; A=straight best-fit line, B=concave-down parabola, C=kinked polyline, D=smooth cosine S-curve best fit (the correct choice).

topic: Sex ratio at birth vs year
image_prompt: SVG: line graph, Sex ratio at birth (100–108, ticks every 1) vs Year (1960–2000, ticks every 5). Flat near 105.3 from 1960–1975 then rising to ~107.7 by 2000, points joined.

SVG: nuclear fission diagram on a dark space background. Two fission-fragment nuclei (clusters of blue protons and white/grey neutrons) flying apart, with three free neutrons ejected. Key for Proton (blue) and Neutron (grey), labels 'Fission fragment' and 'Neutron'.
SVG: Galileo's telescope view — banded planet Jupiter (with a red-spot oval) lower right, and four small bright point-like moons labelled Ganymede, Callisto, Io and Europa on a dark starry sky.

render_data.title: Galileo's view: the four moons of Jupiter
render_data.caption: The four Galilean moons orbit Jupiter, not Earth — evidence against the geocentric model.

image_prompt: SVG: cross-section wedge of the moon Europa against black space — pale cracked 'Ice shell' over a deep-blue 'Ocean', with water plumes erupting through cracks. Labels 'Ice shell' and 'Ocean' with leader lines.

SVG: electromagnetic spectrum bar labelled Gamma rays, X-rays, UV, IR, Radio waves with a 'Wavelength / m' scale (10^-16 to 10^8). A thin visible slit expands to a rainbow 'Visible light' inset with a 400–700 nm scale.

SVG: bench apparatus to test a motor's efficiency — electric motor on bench driving a string over a pulley (on a retort stand) lifting a hanging mass; labelled Stopwatch, Power supply, Pulley, Motor, Mass; 'Diagram not to scale'.

topic: Motor and pulley apparatus with student
image_prompt: SVG: same motor/pulley/mass efficiency apparatus as q4 but with a student standing at the bench holding a stopwatch; labelled Stopwatch, Power supply, Pulley, Motor, Mass; 'Diagram not to scale'.

SVG: spring ball-launcher on a base with a protractor, launching a ball along a red parabolic trajectory; dashed vertical reference at 0°, shaded 'Launch angle' from vertical, double-headed 'Maximum height' arrow to the apex, ball landing on the ground line.
